summary: Notary Booking Calendar feature fully tested. Backend: 28/29 tests PASS (97%) - 1 intermittent 502 due to HCS blockchain latency. Frontend: All pages load and interact correctly. Full booking flow works: Marketplace -> Notary Profile -> Book Session -> Calendar -> Slots -> Form -> Submission. Notary Dashboard Schedule tab works with availability management and blocked dates.

minor.issue: Occasional 502 timeout when HCS topic creation is slow (~3s+ latency)

issues: Minor React hydration warnings on select elements with span wrappers - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Good: All booking CRUD operations work correctly
Good: Slot generation correctly filters by day_of_week and removes booked slots
Good: Booking creation creates linked notarization request with HCS topic
Good: Cancel/Confirm/Complete actions have proper status checks
Good: All data-testid attributes present for UI testing
Good: Calendar UI properly shows available dates based on notary schedule
Good: NotaryAvailabilitySettings component works for setting weekly schedule
Good: My Bookings page shows upcoming and past bookings with correct filters
seed_data_creation: Notary 'notarytest@test.com' has existing availability (Mon-Fri 9AM-5PM, 60min sessions, 15min breaks) and blocked date (2026-03-29). Multiple test bookings created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking Calendar feature complete. Key endpoints: PUT /api/bookings/availability (set schedule), GET /api/bookings/availability/{notary_id} (public), GET /api/bookings/slots/{notary_id}?date=YYYY-MM-DD (available slots), POST /api/bookings (create), GET /api/bookings/my (user bookings), GET /api/bookings/notary (notary bookings), PUT /api/bookings/{id}/confirm|cancel|complete (actions). Frontend pages: /book/:notaryId (BookingCalendar.jsx), /my-bookings (MyBookings.jsx). Notary Dashboard Schedule tab uses NotaryAvailabilitySettings component. Marketplace has 'Book a Session' button on notary profiles.

backend_availability.GET /api/bookings/availability: Notary gets own schedule with blocked dates - PASS
backend_availability.GET /api/bookings/availability/{notary_i: Public endpoint for notary schedule - PASS

backend_slot_generation.GET /api/bookings/slots/{notary_id}?date: Returns available slots - PASS (6 slots for Tuesday)

backend_booking_crud.POST /api/bookings: Create booking + linked notarization request - PASS (intermittent 502 due to HCS)

frontend_marketplace.Notary profile detail: Shows on card click with Book Session button - PASS

frontend_booking_calendar.BookingCalendar page: Loads with notary header and calendar - PASS
frontend_booking_calendar.Booking form fields: Document name, type, notes inputs present - PASS
frontend_booking_calendar.Confirm Booking button: Visible and enabled when form filled - PASS

frontend_my_bookings.My Bookings page: Loads with Upcoming and Past sections - PASS
frontend_my_bookings.Status filters: All, Pending, Confirmed, Completed, Cancelled buttons visible - PASS

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional with real HCS blockchain integration
